name: 末日竟在我身边 - Zombies Everywhere
short_description: When you are holed up alone in a room for 100 days, your food and strength are running out. Outside the corridor, the Walking Dead are walking around. From time to time, there are screams of pain and terror. If there is a future at the end of the world, what will you do on the 101st day?
detailed_description:
优惠套装

强烈推荐购买《祛魅与末日系列全集豪华套装》，获得极致游戏体验！
如果你已经拥有捆绑包中的部分游戏，合集会采用补齐购买方式，即只需要以捆绑包的折扣率付费购买没有的产品，不会重复购买已有游戏。


About the Game

"Zombies Everywhere" is a game of escape from the chamber of secrets in the background of the end of the world.

Introduction

The story takes place on the 101st day after the zombie virus broke out and you were trapped in a room of a building.

Feature

  • Six professions, servant, boxer, nurse, police, athlete and fireman, have been opened to trigger different scenarios and choices.

  • Each profession can choose gender, male or female. New player comes on stage with different props.

  • There are specific keys of every safe and every room. They may be hidden in garbage cans, toilet cisterns, flower pots, or even zombies.

  • Simplified battle judgment based on the rules of Dungeons & Dragons, one second decides the outcome.

Achievement

Sell 3,000 copies or get 50 positive reviews. Develop a sequel story.

Player communication and bug feedback

Official QQ communication group: 582118652
